_comment: Policy file for external (MCP, CLI) tools. The MCP cache (src/mcp/cache.py) continues to source tool *schemas* from servers; this file only describes per-server availability (mode, phase, subagent_visible). CLI bridges may register a handler directly. Default state — empty arrays — means no policy is applied and all cached MCP tools pass through. Use src/tools/loader.py:filter_mcp_tools_by_policy to enforce. Add an entry like {"name": "filesystem", "mode": ["work"], "phase": ["approved"], "name_prefix": "fs_"} to gate a server.
